source_name: WA Government weekly fuel update - statewide stockouts
notes: Hand-keyed from the WA Government Weekly Fuel Update summary dated 17 April 2026. The summary reports 10 stockouts out of 771 WA petrol stations statewide. This is WA-only dated partial coverage, not a live national outage feed.
source_rights: Government of Western Australia copyright; WA.gov.au terms of use apply
citation: Government of Western Australia, WA Government Weekly Fuel Update.

fields.source_wording: Yesterday, WA petrol stations reported a total of 10 stockouts out of 771 stations statewide.
